## User Impact

## Privacy and AI Boundary

- [ ] This change does not upload user materials without preview and confirmation.
- [ ] This change does not auto-approve AI output.
- [ ] This change does not add unsupported learning outcome claims.
- [ ] Not applicable.

## Validation

Commands run:

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`
